abilities.name: Warp Strider
abilities.description: Add 1" to the Move characteristic of models in this model's unit, and each time a model in this model's unit makes a Normal, Advance, Fall Back or Charge move, it can move horizontally through models and terrain features. If this model is wholly within your opponent's deployment zone at the end of the battle, roll one D6: on a 4+, this model gains 1 Arcana point.

abilities.name: Forewarned by Fate
abilities.description: Once per battle round, when an attack is allocated to the bearer's unit, you can change the Damage characteristic of that attack to 0. abilities.name: Rebind Rubricae (Psychic)
abilities.description: In your Command phase, if this model is leading a unit, you can roll one D6: on a 1, that unit suffers D3 mortal wounds; on a 2-5, you can return 1 destroyed Bodyguard model to that unit; on a 6, you can return up to 2 destroyed Bodyguard models to that unit.

abilities.description: This model can be attached to the following unit: ^^**Rubric Marines^^**

abilities.name: Lord of Forbidden Lore
abilities.description: Each time the bearer manifests a Ritual, while resolving the Ritual, add 6" to its range.

abilities.name: Umbralefic Crystal
abilities.description: Once per battle, in your Command phase, if the bearer's unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, you can remove that unit from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves. In the Reinforcements step of your next Movement phase, set that unit back up anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 9" horizontally away from all enemy units.

abilities.name: Eldritch Vortex of E'taph
abilities.description: Add 1 to the Strength and Damage characteristics of Psychic weapons equipped by the bearer.

abilities.name: Incandeum
abilities.description: Once per battle, when selecting a Ritual for the bearer to attempt, you can select Doombolt, even if a model from your army has already attempted to manifest that Ritual this phase.

abilities.name: Arcane Might
abilities.description: Add 1 to the Strength characteristic of Psychic weapons equipped by models in the bearer’s unit. While the bearer’s unit is wholly within your army’s Flow of Magic, add 2 to the Strength characteristic of Psychic weapons equipped by models in that unit instead.

abilities.name: Empowered Manifestation
abilities.description: While the bearer’s unit is wholly within your army’s Flow of Magic, you can add 6" to the range of Psychic abilities the bearer has that specify a range (including Rituals) and each time a model in the bearer’s unit takes a Hazardous test for a Psychic weapon, you can re‑roll the result.

abilities.name: Empyric Onslaught
abilities.description: While the bearer’s unit is wholly within your army’s Flow of Magic, add 3 to the Attacks characteristic of ranged Psychic weapons equipped by the bearer.

abilities.name: Noctilith Mantle
abilities.description: While the bearer’s unit is on the battlefield, it is wholly within your army’s Flow of Magic. Models in that unit cannot be selected to use any Rituals.

abilities.name: Nethershriek Mind-eater
abilities.description: At the start of your Shooting phase, select one enemy unit within 12" of and visible to the bearer. That unit must take a Battle-shock test; if that test is failed, that unit suffers 3 mortal wounds.

abilities.name: Diabolic Servant
abilities.description: While the bearer is within 6" of one or more friendly ^^**Scintillating Legion^^** units, each time the bearer Channels the Warp, add 1 to the Psychic test result.

abilities.name: Duplicitous Malediction
abilities.description: After both players have deployed their armies, select up to three ^^**Thousand Sons^^** units from your army and redeploy them. When doing so, you can set those units up in Strategic Reserve if you wish, regardless of how many units are already in Strategic Reserves.

abilities.name: Tome of True Names
abilities.description: Once per battle, at the start of any phase, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, until the end of the phase, the bearer has a 2+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Warpmeld Dagger
abilities.description: Each time the bearer attempts a Ritual, just before determining the Psychic test result, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, the bearer suffers D3 mortal wounds; if it is not destroyed as a result, add 1 to that Psychic test result for each of those mortal wounds suffered.

abilities.name: Diamond of Distortion
abilities.description: While the bearer is leading a unit, each time an attack targets that unit, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Bray Lord
abilities.description: The bearer has the Scouts 6" ability. During the Declare Battle Formations step, the bearer can be attached to a ^^**Tzaangors^^** unit.

abilities.name: Flowing Flesh
abilities.description: The bearer has the Feel No Pain 4+ ability and a Wounds characteristic of 5.

abilities.description: At the start of the Declare Battle Formations step, select either two ^^**Rubricae Battleline^^** units from your army or one other ^^**Rubricae^^** unit from your army; models in the selected units have the Infiltrators ability.

abilities.name: Arcane Thralls (Aura)
abilities.description: While a friendly ^^**Rubricae^^** unit is within 9" of the bearer, you can re-roll Battle-shock tests taken for that unit.

abilities.name: Lord of the Rubricae
abilities.description: While the bearer is leading a unit, each time a ^^**Rubricae^^** model in that unit makes an attack, add 1 to the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Stave Abominus
abilities.description: The bearer's melee weapons have the [Sustained Hits D3] and [Devastating Wounds] abilities.

abilities.description: While the bearer is within 6" of one or more friendly ^^**Thousand Sons Vehicle^^** units, each time the bearer Channels the Warp, after you roll that additional D6 but before checking for doubles or triples, the bearer can use this Enhancement. abilities.name: Stave Abominus
abilities.description: The bearer's melee weapons have the [Sustained Hits D3] and [Devastating Wounds] abilities.

abilities.name: Warp Syphon
abilities.description: While the bearer is within 6" of one or more friendly ^^**Thousand Sons Vehicle^^** units, each time the bearer Channels the Warp, after you roll that additional D6 but before checking for doubles or triples, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, select one of those ^^**Vehicle^^** units; that ^^**Vehicle^^** unit suffers 1 mortal wound and you can re-roll that additional D6.

abilities.name: Perplexing Cloak
abilities.description: While the bearer is within 3" of one or more friendly ^^**Thousand Sons Vehicle^^** units, the bearer has the Lone Operative ability.

abilities.name: Biomechanical Mutation
abilities.description: In your Command phase, you can select one friendly ^^**Thousand Sons Vehicle^^** model within 6" of this model. That model regains up to D3 lost wounds.

abilities.name: Warp-cursed Runemaster
abilities.description: While the bearer is within 6" of one or more friendly ^^**Thousand Sons Vehicle^^** units, each time the bearer manifests a Ritual, while resolving that Ritual, add 6" to its range.

abilities.name: Crystalline Body
abilities.description: Each time a ranged attack is allocated to this model, on an unmodified saving throw of 6, the attacking unit suffers 1 mortal wound after it has finished making its attacks.

abilities.name: Warp Strider
abilities.description: Add 1" to the Move characteristic of models in this model's unit, and each time a model in this model's unit makes a Normal, Advance, Fall Back or Charge move, it can move horizontally through models and terrain features. If this model is wholly within your opponent's deployment zone at the end of the battle, roll one D6: on a 4+, this model gains 1 Arcana point.

abilities.name: Forewarned by Fate
abilities.description: Once per battle round, when an attack is allocated to the bearer's unit, you can change the Damage characteristic of that attack to 0. If this model is within range of an objective marker that you control at the end of the battle, and that objective marker is not within your deployment zone, roll one D6: on a 4+ this model gains 1 Lore point.

abilities.name: Flesh Sigils
abilities.description: This model has the Feel Not Pain 5+ ability (if this model is a **^^Chaos Spawn^^** model, it has the Feel No Pain 4+ ability instead).

abilities.name: Flame-wreathed
abilities.description: Each time this model makes a melee attack, you can re-roll the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Raptorial Talons
abilities.description: Improve the Strength and Armour Penetration characteristics of this model's melee weapons by 1.

abilities.name: Immaterial Edge
abilities.description: This model's melee weapons have the **[DEVASTATING WOUNDS]** ability.

abilities.name: Temporal Distortion
abilities.description: Add 1 to Advance and Charge rolls made for this model's unit.

abilities.name: Aura of Illusion
abilities.description: This model has the Stealth ability, and while this model is leading a unit, each time a ranged attack targets that unit, if the attacking model is not within 12", subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Leader
abilities.description: This model can be attached to the following unit: ^^**Scarab Occult Terminators^^**

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.description: This model has a 4+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Marked by Fate (Psychic)
abilities.description: At the start of your Shooting phase, select one enemy unit that is visible to this ^^**Psyker^^** model. Until the end of the phase, each time a model in this unit makes an attack that targets that enemy unit, add 1 to the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Lord of Forbidden Lore
abilities.description: Each time the bearer manifests a Ritual, while resolving the Ritual, add 6" to its range.

abilities.name: Umbralefic Crystal
abilities.description: Once per battle, in your Command phase, if the bearer's unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, you can remove that unit from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves. In the Reinforcements step of your next Movement phase, set that unit back up anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 9" horizontally away from all enemy units.

abilities.name: Eldritch Vortex of E'taph
abilities.description: Add 1 to the Strength and Damage characteristics of Psychic weapons equipped by the bearer.

abilities.name: Incandeum
abilities.description: Once per battle, when selecting a Ritual for the bearer to attempt, you can select Doombolt, even if a model from your army has already attempted to manifest that Ritual this phase.

abilities.name: Arcane Might
abilities.description: Add 1 to the Strength characteristic of Psychic weapons equipped by models in the bearer’s unit. While the bearer’s unit is wholly within your army’s Flow of Magic, add 2 to the Strength characteristic of Psychic weapons equipped by models in that unit instead.

abilities.name: Empowered Manifestation
abilities.description: While the bearer’s unit is wholly within your army’s Flow of Magic, you can add 6" to the range of Psychic abilities the bearer has that specify a range (including Rituals) and each time a model in the bearer’s unit takes a Hazardous test for a Psychic weapon, you can re‑roll the result.

abilities.name: Empyric Onslaught
abilities.description: While the bearer’s unit is wholly within your army’s Flow of Magic, add 3 to the Attacks characteristic of ranged Psychic weapons equipped by the bearer.

abilities.name: Noctilith Mantle
abilities.description: While the bearer’s unit is on the battlefield, it is wholly within your army’s Flow of Magic. Models in that unit cannot be selected to use any Rituals.

abilities.name: Nethershriek Mind-eater
abilities.description: At the start of your Shooting phase, select one enemy unit within 12" of and visible to the bearer. That unit must take a Battle-shock test; if that test is failed, that unit suffers 3 mortal wounds.

abilities.name: Diabolic Servant
abilities.description: While the bearer is within 6" of one or more friendly ^^**Scintillating Legion^^** units, each time the bearer Channels the Warp, add 1 to the Psychic test result.

abilities.name: Duplicitous Malediction
abilities.description: After both players have deployed their armies, select up to three ^^**Thousand Sons^^** units from your army and redeploy them. When doing so, you can set those units up in Strategic Reserve if you wish, regardless of how many units are already in Strategic Reserves.

abilities.name: Tome of True Names
abilities.description: Once per battle, at the start of any phase, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, until the end of the phase, the bearer has a 2+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Warpmeld Dagger
abilities.description: Each time the bearer attempts a Ritual, just before determining the Psychic test result, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, the bearer suffers D3 mortal wounds; if it is not destroyed as a result, add 1 to that Psychic test result for each of those mortal wounds suffered.

abilities.name: Aetherstride (Psychic)
abilities.description:
In your Movement phase, when this model is set up on the battlefield using the Deep Strike ability, it can perform an aetherstride. If it does:
- It can be set up anywhere on the battlefield more than 6" horizontally away from all enemy units.
- Until the end of the turn, its Dark Blessing has the [Sustained Hits D3] ability.
- Until the end of the turn, it is not eligible to declare a charge.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save

abilities.name: Lord of Forbidden Lore
abilities.description: Each time the bearer manifests a Ritual, while resolving the Ritual, add 6" to its range.

abilities.name: Umbralefic Crystal
abilities.description: Once per battle, in your Command phase, if the bearer's unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, you can remove that unit from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves. In the Reinforcements step of your next Movement phase, set that unit back up anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 9" horizontally away from all enemy units.

abilities.name: Eldritch Vortex of E'taph
abilities.description: Add 1 to the Strength and Damage characteristics of Psychic weapons equipped by the bearer.

abilities.name: Incandeum
abilities.description: Once per battle, when selecting a Ritual for the bearer to attempt, you can select Doombolt, even if a model from your army has already attempted to manifest that Ritual this phase.

abilities.name: Arcane Might
abilities.description: Add 1 to the Strength characteristic of Psychic weapons equipped by models in the bearer’s unit. While the bearer’s unit is wholly within your army’s Flow of Magic, add 2 to the Strength characteristic of Psychic weapons equipped by models in that unit instead.

abilities.name: Empowered Manifestation
abilities.description: While the bearer’s unit is wholly within your army’s Flow of Magic, you can add 6" to the range of Psychic abilities the bearer has that specify a range (including Rituals) and each time a model in the bearer’s unit takes a Hazardous test for a Psychic weapon, you can re‑roll the result.

abilities.name: Empyric Onslaught
abilities.description: While the bearer’s unit is wholly within your army’s Flow of Magic, add 3 to the Attacks characteristic of ranged Psychic weapons equipped by the bearer.

abilities.name: Noctilith Mantle
abilities.description: While the bearer’s unit is on the battlefield, it is wholly within your army’s Flow of Magic. Models in that unit cannot be selected to use any Rituals.

abilities.name: Nethershriek Mind-eater
abilities.description: At the start of your Shooting phase, select one enemy unit within 12" of and visible to the bearer. That unit must take a Battle-shock test; if that test is failed, that unit suffers 3 mortal wounds.

abilities.name: Diabolic Servant
abilities.description: While the bearer is within 6" of one or more friendly ^^**Scintillating Legion^^** units, each time the bearer Channels the Warp, add 1 to the Psychic test result.

abilities.name: Duplicitous Malediction
abilities.description: After both players have deployed their armies, select up to three ^^**Thousand Sons^^** units from your army and redeploy them. When doing so, you can set those units up in Strategic Reserve if you wish, regardless of how many units are already in Strategic Reserves.

abilities.name: Tome of True Names
abilities.description: Once per battle, at the start of any phase, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, until the end of the phase, the bearer has a 2+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Warpmeld Dagger
abilities.description: Each time the bearer attempts a Ritual, just before determining the Psychic test result, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If this model is within range of an objective marker that you control at the end of the battle, and that objective marker is not within your deployment zone, roll one D6: on a 4+ this model gains 1 Lore point.

abilities.description: At the end of your Command phase, if this model is on the battlefield, take a Leadership test for this model; if that test is passed, you gain 1CP.

abilities.name: One Head Looks Back (Aura)
abilities.description: Each time your opponent targets a unit from their army with a Stratagem, if that unit is within 12" of this model, increase the cost of that use of that Stratagem by 1CP.

abilities.name: Damaged: 1-7 wounds remaining
abilities.description: While this model has 1-7 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Daemon Lord of Tzeentch (Aura)
abilities.description: While a friendly ^^**Scintillating Legions^^** unit is within 6" of this model, each time a model in that unit makes a ranged attack, add 1 to the Strength characteristic of that attack.

abilities.name: Master of Magicks (Aura)
abilities.description: In your Shooting phase, select one of the following abilities: [Ignores Cover], [Lethal Hits], [Sustained Hits D3]. Until the end of the phase, this model's Bolt of Change has that ability.

abilities.name: Lord of Forbidden Lore
abilities.description: Each time the bearer manifests a Ritual, while resolving the Ritual, add 6" to its range.

abilities.name: Umbralefic Crystal
abilities.description: Once per battle, in your Command phase, if the bearer's unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, you can remove that unit from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves. In the Reinforcements step of your next Movement phase, set that unit back up anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 9" horizontally away from all enemy units.

abilities.name: Eldritch Vortex of E'taph
abilities.description: Add 1 to the Strength and Damage characteristics of Psychic weapons equipped by the bearer.

abilities.name: Incandeum
abilities.description: Once per battle, when selecting a Ritual for the bearer to attempt, you can select Doombolt, even if a model from your army has already attempted to manifest that Ritual this phase.

abilities.name: Arcane Might
abilities.description: Add 1 to the Strength characteristic of Psychic weapons equipped by models in the bearer’s unit. While the bearer’s unit is wholly within your army’s Flow of Magic, add 2 to the Strength characteristic of Psychic weapons equipped by models in that unit instead.

abilities.name: Empowered Manifestation
abilities.description: While the bearer’s unit is wholly within your army’s Flow of Magic, you can add 6" to the range of Psychic abilities the bearer has that specify a range (including Rituals) and each time a model in the bearer’s unit takes a Hazardous test for a Psychic weapon, you can re‑roll the result.

abilities.name: Empyric Onslaught
abilities.description: While the bearer’s unit is wholly within your army’s Flow of Magic, add 3 to the Attacks characteristic of ranged Psychic weapons equipped by the bearer.

abilities.name: Noctilith Mantle
abilities.description: While the bearer’s unit is on the battlefield, it is wholly within your army’s Flow of Magic. Models in that unit cannot be selected to use any Rituals.

abilities.name: Nethershriek Mind-eater
abilities.description: At the start of your Shooting phase, select one enemy unit within 12" of and visible to the bearer. That unit must take a Battle-shock test; if that test is failed, that unit suffers 3 mortal wounds.

abilities.name: Diabolic Servant
abilities.description: While the bearer is within 6" of one or more friendly ^^**Scintillating Legion^^** units, each time the bearer Channels the Warp, add 1 to the Psychic test result.

abilities.name: Duplicitous Malediction
abilities.description: After both players have deployed their armies, select up to three ^^**Thousand Sons^^** units from your army and redeploy them. When doing so, you can set those units up in Strategic Reserve if you wish, regardless of how many units are already in Strategic Reserves.

abilities.name: Tome of True Names
abilities.description: Once per battle, at the start of any phase, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, until the end of the phase, the bearer has a 2+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Warpmeld Dagger
abilities.description: Each time the bearer attempts a Ritual, just before determining the Psychic test result, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, the bearer suffers D3 mortal wounds; if it is not destroyed as a result, add 1 to that Psychic test result for each of those mortal wounds suffered.

abilities.name: Diamond of Distortion
abilities.description: While the bearer is leading a unit, each time an attack targets that unit, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Bray Lord
abilities.description: The bearer has the Scouts 6" ability. During the Declare Battle Formations step, the bearer can be attached to a ^^**Tzaangors^^** unit.

abilities.name: Flowing Flesh
abilities.description: The bearer has the Feel No Pain 4+ ability and a Wounds characteristic of 5.

abilities.name: Risen Rubricae
abilities.description: At the start of the Declare Battle Formations step, select either two ^^**Rubricae Battleline^^** units from your army or one other ^^**Rubricae^^** unit from your army; models in the selected units have the Infiltrators ability.

abilities.name: Arcane Thralls (Aura)
abilities.description: While a friendly ^^**Rubricae^^** unit is within 9" of the bearer, you can re-roll Battle-shock tests taken for that unit.

abilities.name: Lord of the Rubricae
abilities.description: While the bearer is leading a unit, each time a ^^**Rubricae^^** model in that unit makes an attack, add 1 to the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Stave Abominus
abilities.description: The bearer's melee weapons have the [Sustained Hits D3] and [Devastating Wounds] abilities.

abilities.name: Warp Syphon
abilities.description: While the bearer is within 6" of one or more friendly ^^**Thousand Sons Vehicle^^** units, each time the bearer Channels the Warp, after you roll that additional D6 but before checking for doubles or triples, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, select one of those ^^**Vehicle^^** units; that ^^**Vehicle^^** unit suffers 1 mortal wound and you can re-roll that additional D6.

abilities.name: Perplexing Cloak
abilities.description: While the bearer is within 3" of one or more friendly ^^**Thousand Sons Vehicle^^** units, the bearer has the Lone Operative ability.

abilities.name: Biomechanical Mutation
abilities.description: In your Command phase, you can select one friendly ^^**Thousand Sons Vehicle^^** model within 6" of this model. That model regains up to D3 lost wounds.

abilities.name: Warp-cursed Runemaster
abilities.description: While the bearer is within 6" of one or more friendly ^^**Thousand Sons Vehicle^^** units, each time the bearer manifests a Ritual, while resolving that Ritual, add 6" to its range.

abilities.name: Slashing Dive
abilities.description: In your Movement phase, after this unit ends a Normal move, select one enemy unit it moved over during that move and roll one D6 for each model in this unit: for each 4+, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.description: Models in this unit have a 4+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Split
abilities.description: Each time a ^^**Pink Horror^^** or ^^**Blue Horror^^** model in this unit is destroyed, after the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, if this unit is not destroyed, roll one D6 for that model. On a 4+, if it was a ^^**Pink Horror^^**, add 2 ^^**Blue Horror^^** models to this unit and if it was a ^^**Blue Horror^^**, add one ^^**Brimstone Horror^^** model to this unit.

abilities.name: Horrors are Pink. Horrors are Blue. Where once there was one, now there are two.
abilities.description:
If, at any point, this unit contains no ^^Pink Horrors^^ models, use the ^^Blue Horrors^^ datasheet for this unit. 

_Designer’s Note: While this unit contains one or more ^^Pink Horrors^^ models, the Sullen Malevolence and Exploding Horrors abilities from the Blue Horrors datasheet do not apply to this unit._

abilities.name: Scuttling Walker
abilities.description: Each time this unit makes a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move, it can move through models (excluding ^^**Titanic**^^ models) and terrain features. When doing so, it can move within Engagement Range of enemy models, but cannot end that move within Engagement Range of them, and any Desperate Escape test is automatically passed.

abilities.name: Destroyer of Futures
abilities.description: Each time you target this unit with the Fire Overwatch Stratagem, hits are scored on unmodified Hit rolls of 5+ when resolving that Stratagem. For each of those attacks that targets an enemy unit within 9" of one or more ^^**Thousand Sons Psyker**^^ units from your army, a hit is scored on an unmodified Hit roll of 4+ instead.

abilities.name: Crystalline Body
abilities.description: Each time a ranged attack is allocated to this model, on an unmodified saving throw of 6, the attacking unit suffers 1 mortal wound after it has finished making its attacks.

abilities.name: Warp Strider
abilities.description: Add 1" to the Move characteristic of models in this model's unit, and each time a model in this model's unit makes a Normal, Advance, Fall Back or Charge move, it can move horizontally through models and terrain features. If this model is wholly within your opponent's deployment zone at the end of the battle, roll one D6: on a 4+, this model gains 1 Arcana point.

abilities.name: Forewarned by Fate
abilities.description: Once per battle round, when an attack is allocated to the bearer's unit, you can change the Damage characteristic of that attack to 0. If this model is within range of an objective marker that you control at the end of the battle, and that objective marker is not within your deployment zone, roll one D6: on a 4+ this model gains 1 Lore point.

abilities.name: Flesh Sigils
abilities.description: This model has the Feel Not Pain 5+ ability (if this model is a **^^Chaos Spawn^^** model, it has the Feel No Pain 4+ ability instead).

abilities.name: Flame-wreathed
abilities.description: Each time this model makes a melee attack, you can re-roll the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Raptorial Talons
abilities.description: Improve the Strength and Armour Penetration characteristics of this model's melee weapons by 1.

abilities.name: Immaterial Edge
abilities.description: This model's melee weapons have the **[DEVASTATING WOUNDS]** ability.

abilities.name: Temporal Distortion
abilities.description: Add 1 to Advance and Charge rolls made for this model's unit.

abilities.name: Aura of Illusion
abilities.description: This model has the Stealth ability, and while this model is leading a unit, each time a ranged attack targets that unit, if the attacking model is not within 12", subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

enhancements.name: Lord of Forbidden Lore
enhancements.description: Each time the bearer manifests a Ritual, while resolving the Ritual, add 6" to its range.

enhancements.name: Umbralefic Crystal
enhancements.description: Once per battle, in your Command phase, if the bearer's unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, you can remove that unit from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves. In the Reinforcements step of your next Movement phase, set that unit back up anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 9" horizontally away from all enemy units.

enhancements.name: Eldritch Vortex of E'taph
enhancements.description: Add 1 to the Strength and Damage characteristics of Psychic weapons equipped by the bearer.

enhancements.name: Incandeum
enhancements.description: Once per battle, when selecting a Ritual for the bearer to attempt, you can select Doombolt, even if a model from your army has already attempted to manifest that Ritual this phase.

enhancements.name: Arcane Might
enhancements.description: Add 1 to the Strength characteristic of Psychic weapons equipped by models in the bearer’s unit. While the bearer’s unit is wholly within your army’s Flow of Magic, add 2 to the Strength characteristic of Psychic weapons equipped by models in that unit instead.

enhancements.name: Empowered Manifestation
enhancements.description: While the bearer’s unit is wholly within your army’s Flow of Magic, you can add 6" to the range of Psychic abilities the bearer has that specify a range (including Rituals) and each time a model in the bearer’s unit takes a Hazardous test for a Psychic weapon, you can re‑roll the result.

enhancements.name: Empyric Onslaught
enhancements.description: While the bearer’s unit is wholly within your army’s Flow of Magic, add 3 to the Attacks characteristic of ranged Psychic weapons equipped by the bearer.

enhancements.name: Noctilith Mantle
enhancements.description: While the bearer’s unit is on the battlefield, it is wholly within your army’s Flow of Magic. Models in that unit cannot be selected to use any Rituals.

enhancements.name: Nethershriek Mind-eater
enhancements.description: At the start of your Shooting phase, select one enemy unit within 12" of and visible to the bearer. That unit must take a Battle-shock test; if that test is failed, that unit suffers 3 mortal wounds.

enhancements.name: Diabolic Servant
enhancements.description: While the bearer is within 6" of one or more friendly ^^**Scintillating Legion^^** units, each time the bearer Channels the Warp, add 1 to the Psychic test result.

enhancements.name: Duplicitous Malediction
enhancements.description: After both players have deployed their armies, select up to three ^^**Thousand Sons^^** units from your army and redeploy them. When doing so, you can set those units up in Strategic Reserve if you wish, regardless of how many units are already in Strategic Reserves.

enhancements.name: Tome of True Names
enhancements.description: Once per battle, at the start of any phase, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, until the end of the phase, the bearer has a 2+ invulnerable save.

enhancements.name: Warpmeld Dagger
enhancements.description: Each time the bearer attempts a Ritual, just before determining the Psychic test result, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, the bearer suffers D3 mortal wounds; if it is not destroyed as a result, add 1 to that Psychic test result for each of those mortal wounds suffered.

enhancements.name: Diamond of Distortion
enhancements.description: While the bearer is leading a unit, each time an attack targets that unit, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

enhancements.name: Bray Lord
enhancements.description: The bearer has the Scouts 6" ability. During the Declare Battle Formations step, the bearer can be attached to a ^^**Tzaangors^^** unit.

enhancements.name: Flowing Flesh
enhancements.description: The bearer has the Feel No Pain 4+ ability and a Wounds characteristic of 5.

enhancements.name: Risen Rubricae
enhancements.description: At the start of the Declare Battle Formations step, select either two ^^**Rubricae Battleline^^** units from your army or one other ^^**Rubricae^^** unit from your army; models in the selected units have the Infiltrators ability.

enhancements.name: Arcane Thralls (Aura)
enhancements.description: While a friendly ^^**Rubricae^^** unit is within 9" of the bearer, you can re-roll Battle-shock tests taken for that unit.

enhancements.name: Lord of the Rubricae
enhancements.description: While the bearer is leading a unit, each time a ^^**Rubricae^^** model in that unit makes an attack, add 1 to the Hit roll.

enhancements.name: Stave Abominus
enhancements.description: The bearer's melee weapons have the [Sustained Hits D3] and [Devastating Wounds] abilities.

enhancements.name: Warp Syphon
enhancements.description: While the bearer is within 6" of one or more friendly ^^**Thousand Sons Vehicle^^** units, each time the bearer Channels the Warp, after you roll that additional D6 but before checking for doubles or triples, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, select one of those ^^**Vehicle^^** units; that ^^**Vehicle^^** unit suffers 1 mortal wound and you can re-roll that additional D6.

enhancements.name: Perplexing Cloak
enhancements.description: While the bearer is within 3" of one or more friendly ^^**Thousand Sons Vehicle^^** units, the bearer has the Lone Operative ability.

enhancements.name: Biomechanical Mutation
enhancements.description: In your Command phase, you can select one friendly ^^**Thousand Sons Vehicle^^** model within 6" of this model. That model regains up to D3 lost wounds.

enhancements.name: Warp-cursed Runemaster
enhancements.description: While the bearer is within 6" of one or more friendly ^^**Thousand Sons Vehicle^^** units, each time the bearer manifests a Ritual, while resolving that Ritual, add 6" to its range.
